zh.Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England: 英國英格蘭賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Tregoz II於1241年出生在英國賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德時，他的父親Robert de Tregoz II51歲，母親Juliane de Cantilupe22歲。他於1263年4月6日之後與Mabel FitzWarin在英國賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1288年被列為member of parliament (mp)。他去世於1300年8月21日在英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托享年59歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Tregoz II于1241年出生在英国賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德时，他的父亲Robert de Tregoz II51岁，母亲Juliane de Cantilupe22岁。他于1263年4月6日之后与Mabel FitzWarin在英国賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1288年被列为member of parliament (mp)。他去世于1300年8月21日在英国格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托享年59岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tregoz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cornish (Cornwall and Devon): habitational name from Treago in Crantock (Cornwall). The placename derives from Middle Cornish tre ‘estate, farmstead’ + uncertain final element.
Altered form of French   Tricot   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. It was reportedly brought to North America from England. Today it is found mainly in PA and OH. Compare   Trago  .
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Trago
meanings: Variant of   Trego  , a surname of Cornish and French origin. In the US, it is found mainly in PA and OH.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Tregoz II was born in 1241, in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, his father, Robert de Tregoz II, was 51 and his mother, Juliane de Cantilupe, was 22. He married Mabel FitzWarin after 6 April 1263, in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. In 1288, at the age of 47, his occupation is listed as member of parliament (mp). He died on 21 August 1300, in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Tregoz II est né en 1241, à Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Tregoz II, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Juliane de Cantilupe, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Mabel FitzWarin après 6 avril 1263, à Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. En 1288, à l’âge de 47 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament (mp). Il est décédé le 21 août 1300, à Bristol, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Bristol, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England: Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John de Tregoz II 1241 in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Tregoz II 51 und seine Mutter Juliane de Cantilupe 22. Er hat nach 6. April 1263 in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England Mabel FitzWarin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1288, als er 47 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament (mp) aufgeführt. Er starb am 21. August 1300 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Tregoz II è nato il nel 1241 nel Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Tregoz II, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Juliane de Cantilupe, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Mabel FitzWarin dopo il 6 aprile 1263, nel Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1288, all'età di 47 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament (mp). Morì il 21 agosto 1300, nel Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Bristol, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Tregoz IIが1241年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエウヤス ハロルドで生まれた時，父Robert de Tregoz IIは51歳，母Juliane de Cantilupeは22歳であった。1263年4月6日以後にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエウヤス ハロルドでMabel FitzWarinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1288年，47歳の時，職業はmember of parliament (mp)と記録されている。彼は1300年8月21日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリストルで59歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Tregoz II(이)가 1241년 영국 허퍼드실르 와이아스 하로드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Tregoz II(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliane de Cantilupe(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1263년 4월 6일 이후 영국 허퍼드실르 와이아스 하로드에서 Mabel FitzWarin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1288년, 47세의 나이로 그의 직업은 member of parliament (mp)이었다. 그는 1300년 8월 21일 영국 그루스스터실르 브리스톨에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 브리스톨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Tregoz II nasceu em 1241, em Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Tregoz II, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Juliane de Cantilupe, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Mabel FitzWarin após 6 de abril de 1263, em Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1288, com 47 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament (mp). Ele faleceu em 21 de agosto de 1300, em Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Tregoz II родился в 1241 г. в местности ювяс харолд, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Tregoz II было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Juliane de Cantilupe, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Mabel FitzWarin после 6 апрель 1263 г. в местности ювяс харолд, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. В 1288 году, в возрасте 47 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliament (mp). Он умер 21 августа 1300 г. в местности бристол, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности бристол, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Tregoz II nació en 1241, en Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Tregoz II, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Juliane de Cantilupe, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Mabel FitzWarin después de 6 de abril de 1263, en Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1288, a la edad de 47 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament (mp). Murió el 21 de agosto de 1300, en Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
